event: Swearing of the oath at the ratification of the Treaty of Munster
description: A large group of men, mostly dressed in black with white collars, stand in a formal interior raising their right hands in an oath. At the center, a man holds an open book or document. Several figures wear bright red cloaks, standing out against the predominantly dark clothing. A large ornate chandelier hangs above, and the room appears to be a civic or ecclesiastical hall. Dozens of witnesses crowd behind the principal figures. The scene captures a solemn, historic moment of political ceremony.

_meta.title: The Swearing of the Oath of Ratification of the Treaty of Munster
